CustomField.description: External identifier from the agency's permitting system (e.g., USACE action ID, FERC project number, EPA NPDES permit number). Used as the query key in NepaAgencyPermitService live callouts. ExternalId = true enables upsert from integration flows.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Agency-assigned permit application number or identifier from the external permitting system.
CustomField.label: External Federal ID
